obligation: Downstream data requirements have lawful carry-forward.
The build package is bound to the current workflow state.
An active audit binding is available.
control: Fail closed if the lock binding is missing.
Fail closed if build assertions fail.
Fail closed if dependency or integrity checks remain unresolved.
Fail closed if a later invalidating event makes the build state stale.
evidence: Audit trace records sufficient to reconstruct why progression was permitted or blocked.
mechanism_formation_notes: Compile the assurance tuple into a local mechanism that checks lock, dependency, integrity, and currentness before allowing downstream continuation.
